seoTitle: How to Create a Pop-Up in GoHighLevel
metaDescription: Build a pop-up in GoHighLevel to capture leads or promote offers on your website or funnel pages.
intro: Pop-ups are a common way to capture leads, promote offers, or highlight important announcements on a website or funnel. This overview covers the general steps for creating and configuring a pop-up within GoHighLevel's page builder tools.

steps.heading: Open your page or funnel settings
steps.body: Navigate to the page or funnel where you want the pop-up to appear.

steps.heading: Add a pop-up element
steps.body: Use GoHighLevel's builder tools to add a pop-up block to your page.

steps.heading: Customize the pop-up content
steps.body: Add your offer, lead capture form, or announcement text and design the pop-up to match your branding.

steps.heading: Set display triggers
steps.body: Configure when the pop-up appears, such as after a time delay, on exit intent, or based on scroll depth.

steps.heading: Publish and test the pop-up
steps.body: Publish your changes and preview the page to confirm the pop-up displays and functions as intended.

faq.question: What can I use a pop-up for in GoHighLevel?
faq.answer: Common uses include capturing leads, promoting offers, and highlighting announcements on your website or funnel pages.

faq.question: Can I control when the pop-up appears?
faq.answer: Yes, setting display triggers like time delay or exit intent is part of configuring a pop-up.

faq.question: Will the pop-up work on mobile?
faq.answer: Testing your pop-up after publishing helps confirm it displays properly across devices.

faq.question: Can I connect the pop-up to a lead capture form?
faq.answer: Yes, pop-ups commonly include lead capture forms as part of their content.

faq.question: Is creating a pop-up beginner-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GoHighLevel's builder tools are designed to let you add and customize elements like pop-ups without coding.
